title: Ex-Ditector Metadata Exposure Scanner Input
description: Scans the SELF subject's OWN public assets for leaked embedded metadata (EXIF GPS, device serial, software, author, contact email). Reading embedded metadata is a dual-use technique, so the scope enum intentionally omits consented/brand/safety_evidence and accepts only self/public_figure. Only logged-out, publicly-reachable URLs you own (or a public figure's public assets) are fetched; no login, captcha, or rate-limit evasion.

scope_type.title: Scope type
scope_type.description: Embedded-metadata extraction is permitted ONLY for your own footprint (self) or a genuine public figure acting publicly. Other compliant scopes (consented/brand/safety_evidence) intentionally cannot run this actor.

asset_urls.title: Public asset URLs to scan (yours only)
asset_urls.description: Direct https URLs to images/PDFs YOU published (or a public figure's public assets). Each file is downloaded once, logged-out, and parsed locally. Private-social hosts (Instagram/Facebook/Tinder…) are rejected by the scope gate. Files behind a login (401/403) are skipped, not bypassed.

subject_label.title: Subject label
subject_label.description: Human label for the subject (e.g. your name). Used only for reporting.
